title: 50x50 cm Stick-on Mirror for Wall - 2.5mm Acrylic Self-adhesive Square Tiles for Bathroom, Bedroom, Home Decor
features: 【Acrylic Mirror】This self adhesive mirror is made of sturdy acrylic material, The size is 50x50cm, Thickness 2.5mm, smooth surface, shatterproof and unbreakable, so you can enjoy a safe environment and protect family and pets from accidental injuries

【Easy Installation】It can be easily installed on smooth walls, latex paint walls, light-hole tiled wall furniture or wooden doors, WARM TIPS: The image may be distorted if you install these mirror tiles on an uneven surface, please confirm the walls are flat before purchasing. After fixed, do not move at will

【Safe transportation】There are protective films on the plastic mirrors, which can protect the lens from being destroyed and getting broken during the transportation, so don't worry that the mirror may be scratched when receiving, and you need to tear the films off before using

【DIY Wall Decoration】Use multiple pieces to easily combine into a full-length mirror, cheaper than buying body mirrors separately. You can use our wall mirror to create any pattern you like. Enjoy doing it yourself

【Versatile and Functional】The plastic mirrors have good reflective effect, which can be applied to decorate your home, the reflective side can make the space look larger and brighter, These mirror tiles are the perfect solution when you want to enhance the aesthetic appeal of your living space, embark on a craft project, or add a touch of reflection to your furniture with our mirror sheets
description: Product description TSKDKIT 50 x 50 cm acrylic mirrors with foam sticky pads Strong material Acrylic mirrors are stronger and durabler, provide long service time Better reflections Wall mirrors is 2.5mm in thickness, better reflective effect than other similar mirror stickers in the long distance. Easy to Install Mirror tiles come with double-sided sticky foam pads, easy to stick, and never damage the wall, can be used on any smooth surface. With Protective Film Mirrors with a protective film, protect the mirror surface from damage or scratches during transportation. Decoration mirror This self adhesive mirror can be used to arrange on wall, well make your home looks more spacious, bright and attractive. Delivery: 1 x acrylic mirrors Warm note: This non glass mirrors is flexible, so if stick on non-flat wall is easy to distort, please ensure the wall is flat. The package come with lots of adhesive pad, recommended to use a few more adhesive pads and stick evenly to keep the mirror flat so that it will not distort Safety Warning Avoid installing on uneven surfaces. Use additional adhesive pads to keep the mirror flat and prevent distortion.
